blockers.description: P0: Worker pool dead on jared box. Queue frozen (was 61 items last cycle). All 32 PIDs dead. No scheduled agents running. Human must run server/deploy.sh. Third cycle without resolution.

P0 (NEW): octi-pulpo policy pack missing — all Octi Pulpo MCP coordination tools (coord_claim, sprint_status, memory_store, etc.) blocked by default-deny in governed sessions. Blocks all agent coordination.
P1: no-governance-self-modification blocks read-only SQLite analytics queries. Second occurrence. Third attempt would trigger LOCKDOWN. Kernel squad assigned.
P1: Copilot event pipeline producing 0 events. Conference demo gap (May 6). No update in 3+ cycles. Escalating — if no update by next HQ cycle, health → RED.
P1: readybench QA swarm non-operational 5+ days. All 19 agents skipping (wrong queue routing). bench-devs-platform not found on jared host.
P2: Codex + Copilot circuit breakers OPEN (budget exhaustion). 68/132 agents blocked (52%). Auto-resolves 2026-04-01. No action needed — 2 days remaining.
